jobs.title: VAPT Intern
jobs.description: Join our security team for hands-on experience in Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing. Work on real-world security challenges.
jobs.fullDescription: As a VAPT Intern, you'll work alongside our security experts to identify vulnerabilities in web applications, networks, and infrastructure. This is a 3-6 month intensive program where you'll learn industry-standard tools and methodologies while contributing to actual client projects. You'll gain practical experience in ethical hacking, security assessment, and vulnerability remediation.
requirements: Currently pursuing or recently completed degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, or related field
Basic understanding of web application security (OWASP Top 10)
Familiarity with security tools like Burp Suite, Nmap, or Metasploit
Knowledge of at least one scripting language (Python, Bash, or PowerShell)
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Passion for cybersecurity and ethical hacking
responsibilities: Conduct vulnerability assessments on web applications and networks
Perform penetration testing under supervision of senior security engineers
Document findings and create detailed security reports
Assist in security research and tool development
Participate in security training and knowledge sharing sessions
Help maintain security testing infrastructure
benefits: Hands-on experience with enterprise security tools
Mentorship from experienced security professionals
Opportunity to work on real client projects
Flexible remote work schedule
Certificate of completion and recommendation letter
Potential for full-time conversion based on performance

jobs.title: Social Media Lead
jobs.description: Lead our social media strategy and build our brand presence across platforms. Create engaging content that resonates with the cybersecurity community.
jobs.fullDescription: We're looking for a creative and strategic Social Media Lead to build and execute our social media strategy. You'll be responsible for growing our online presence, engaging with the cybersecurity community, and establishing PurpleRain as a thought leader in the security space. This role requires a unique blend of creativity, technical understanding, and data-driven decision making.
requirements: 3+ years of experience in social media management, preferably in tech or cybersecurity
Proven track record of growing social media presence and engagement
Strong understanding of social media platforms (LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, YouTube)
Experience with social media analytics and reporting tools
Excellent writing and communication skills
Basic understanding of cybersecurity concepts and terminology
Experience with content creation tools (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, etc.)
Data-driven mindset with ability to analyze metrics and optimize strategy
responsibilities: Develop and execute comprehensive social media strategy across all platforms
Create engaging content including posts, videos, infographics, and articles
Manage social media calendar and ensure consistent posting schedule
Engage with community, respond to comments, and build relationships
Monitor social media trends and competitor activities
Analyze performance metrics and provide regular reports
Collaborate with marketing and product teams on campaigns
Manage social media advertising budget and campaigns
benefits: Competitive salary with performance bonuses
Fully remote position with flexible hours
Professional development budget for courses and conferences
Latest tools and software for content creation
Health insurance coverage
4 weeks paid vacation
Opportunity to shape brand voice and strategy

jobs.title: Chief Marketing Officer - APAC Region
jobs.description: Lead marketing strategy and execution for the Asia-Pacific region. Build brand awareness and drive growth in key Asian markets.
jobs.fullDescription: We're seeking an experienced Chief Marketing Officer to lead our expansion in the Asia-Pacific region. This role requires deep understanding of Asian markets, cultural nuances, and business practices. You'll be responsible for developing and executing regional marketing strategy, building partnerships, and establishing PurpleRain as a leading cybersecurity brand across APAC markets including India, Singapore, Japan, South Korea, and Southeast Asia.
requirements: 10+ years of marketing experience with at least 5 years in leadership roles
Proven track record of successful marketing campaigns in APAC markets
Deep understanding of Asian business culture and market dynamics
Experience in B2B technology or cybersecurity marketing
Strong network in the Asian tech and business community
Fluency in English; additional Asian languages (Mandarin, Japanese, Korean, Hindi) highly preferred
Experience with digital marketing, content strategy, and demand generation
Strong analytical skills and data-driven decision making
Excellent leadership and team building capabilities
responsibilities: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategy for APAC region
Build and lead regional marketing team
Establish partnerships with local businesses, resellers, and influencers
Adapt global brand messaging for regional markets
Drive demand generation and lead acquisition in target markets
Manage regional marketing budget and ROI optimization
Represent PurpleRain at regional conferences and events
Collaborate with sales team on regional go-to-market strategy
Monitor market trends and competitive landscape in APAC
Report on regional marketing performance to executive team
benefits: Competitive executive compensation package
Equity/stock options in the company
Fully remote with flexibility for regional travel
Generous professional development budget
Health insurance and wellness benefits
4 weeks paid vacation plus regional holidays
Opportunity to build and lead regional operations
Direct impact on company's international growth
